Résoudre dans \(\RR\) l'équation
\(((wims(append item (random(-1)\cdot x+(1)\cdot 1)/(random(-1))/((1)\cdot 1); to ))\cdot x+((+(1)\cdot 1)/(random(-1)\cdot (1)\cdot 1); to ))/(wims(append item (random(-1);)));=0\)   .
Cocher la bonne réponse dans la liste ci-dessous.


  \(wims(append item wims(append item ((-\q1\cdot \p2\cdot (1,2,-3,-2,-1,3[\k]))/((\p1\cdot \q2)\cdot (1,2,-3,-2,-1,3[\k])) to )) to wims(append item texmath((-1)*1/(random(-1)/(wims(append item (random(-1)+(1/(4,-2,2,3,-4,-1,1,-3[\k]));)) to ))[6])         \(wims(append item wims(append item ((-\q1\cdot \p2\cdot (1,2,-3,-2,-1,3[\k]))/((\p1\cdot \q2)\cdot (1,2,-3,-2,-1,3[\k])) to )) to wims(append item texmath((-1)*1/(random(-1)/(wims(append item (random(-1)+(1/(4,-2,2,3,-4,-1,1,-3[\k]));)) to ))[])
